hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys, json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path') or d.get('path') or '')" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'cards/'; then echo "--- Auto-validating: $FILE ---"; python scripts/validate-card.py "$FILE" 2>&1 || true; fi

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys, json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path') or d.get('path') or '')" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'canvas/'; then echo "--- Canvas write: $FILE ---"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qv 'canvas/components/\|canvas/tests/\|canvas/src/'; then echo "INFO: Write to canvas/ root path: $FILE"; fi; echo "Art direction: intaglio aesthetic — see AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md canvas section"; fi
echo '📊 PPL± Session Init'; python scripts/progress-report.py 2>/dev/null || echo 'Progress report script not found — run infrastructure sprint first.'
echo '⚠️  Context compacted. Re-read CLAUDE.md and whiteboard.md before continuing. Current phase: Phase 2 — Workout Generation. 80/1680 cards complete. Active deck and task are in whiteboard.md.'
